completed_tasks.name: Create preview.tsx with CSS imports, decorator, storySort
Create Design Purpose and Design Principles MDX pages
Verify Storybook sidebar and Figma pages (checkpoint)

decisions.decision: Storybook 10.3.1 (not 8) — installed version wins over stale ROADMAP reference
decisions.rationale: Already installed and working in Phase 1

decisions.decision: Import parent-brand/light.css only — not all 4 semantic CSS files
decisions.rationale: Both light CSS files use :root selector — simultaneous import causes silent last-import-wins collision
Semantic token background is honest to the system; 2rem is industry standard

decisions.decision: preview.ts renamed to preview.tsx for JSX decorator support
decisions.rationale: JSX (<Story />) not valid in .ts file — causes parse error at startup

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 5 to gather context for Token Documentation Pages — color, typography, spacing, elevation, grid/breakpoints visual reference pages + brand×mode theme switcher
context_notes: Phase 4 fully complete and verified. All 4 phases of the first half of v1.0 are done (monorepo → primitives → semantics → Storybook foundation). Phase 5 builds the visual token reference pages that populate the Storybook sidebar categories (Tokens section). Phase 6 builds the primitive React components. The brand×mode theme switcher toolbar was explicitly deferred from Phase 4 to Phase 5 — Phase 5 will need to update the SD config to use brand-scoped CSS selectors before the switcher can work.
